name: Playwright Screenshot
description: Open a website and save a screenshot to the selected folder

windows.install: cmd /C "npm install && npx playwright install chromium"

mac.install: sh -lc 'npm install && npx playwright install chromium'

parameters.name: url
parameters.label: Website URL
parameters.description: Target website to open before taking a screenshot

parameters.name: outputDir
parameters.label: Output Folder
parameters.description: Directory where screenshot.png will be written
